name: autocad-tianzheng-tools
description: Codex plugin for AutoCAD 2026 and Tianzheng HVAC T30 automation through the autocad_tianzheng MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Packages a local MCP launcher and skill guidance for AutoCAD 2026 and Tianzheng HVAC T30 drawing, scanning, and troubleshooting workflows. The plugin MCP server appears as autocad_tianzheng.
defaultPrompt: Scan this DWG into an index.
